most_useful: The content and exercises really help me improve my understanding bit by bit. I think as PMs, we often use ChatGPT to write posts or draft content, but we rarely take the time to realize that giving it proper context and more information makes everything much more productive.
future_learning: I’d love to go deeper into how PMs can use AI beyond content creation — especially for processing data, gathering richer user feedback, and generating insights faster. I feel like, as PMs, we’re still a bit lost when it comes to AI. For developers, things seem a lot clearer, but for us, it’s often not obvious which tools or approaches can truly support product strategy and decision-making. I’d really like to learn more practical ways to bridge that gap.
